core_principle: Before editing a file, understand where it lives and what its directory owns.

directories.role: Comeketo automation, client substrate, inbox skill, orchestrator, design assets
directories.ownership: team's standalone automation folder; orchestrator owns it
warnings: Do not write through this alias unless the team explicitly asks (CLAUDE.md §1).
2026-04-28 verbatim comms backfill was an authorized write.

directories.role: Box Collection — 28 per-client living memory/state/plan substrates
warnings: Plans are subordinate to comms, state, guardrails, and approvals.
Profiles and enrichment are internal strategy unless approved for customer-facing use.

directories.role: Render/state/check layer — reads substrates and produces dashboards/state/readiness
Runtime output — dashboards, state files, leads, runs, voice
warnings: DO NOT hand-edit. Find the generator script in Auto/orchestrator/bin/.

directories.role: Routine catalogs — automations, dashboard, lead box, today, overview
Inbox skill + send guardrails + email templates + pricing scripts
24 build/import/enrichment scripts — subset of top-level Onboard Scripts/
warnings: NOT identical to top-level Onboard Scripts/ — missing 7 analytics_*.py files. See common wrong-turns.

directories.role: Standalone Client Box demo with own AGENTS.md; sits outside Auto/Client Boxes/
Apparent snapshot/mirror of Auto/orchestrator/ + Auto/comeketo-inbox/ with newer mtimes (2026-04-27 16:23)
warnings: Likely stale duplicate. DO NOT edit. Coordinate with Jake before any cleanup.

directories.role: Design system (mirror of top-level Comeketo Agent/)
Screenshots and reference files (autodre.txt, ballpark template, voice profiles xlsx)
App bedrock — the only filesystem state the app owns. Loader authority lives at indexes/index.json.
warnings: CLAUDE.md §1 surviving-domains list is OUT OF DATE. Reality has 26 dirs (10 .gitkeep stubs + 16 populated). Trust this ledger's directory list.

directories.role: People records (kind: coworker / lead / client / contact)

warnings: inbox.jsonl is append-only; entries marked swept by appending a new line, not editing.

directories.role: Runnable app-agent definitions (agents.md + prompt.md per agent); includes global_ledger_steward
Wiped in Apr 2026 great trim; only .gitkeep remains
Off-grid specialty vaults — empty until summoned

warnings: Superset of Auto/Onboard Scripts/. Includes 7 analytics_*.py not in Auto/. Treat top-level as canonical.
docs/page_asset_sitemap.md is 11 KB and outdated; root version is 65 KB and live.

directories.role: External CSV/MD imports (sales playbook, scoreboards, venue index, partnership program docs)
Design system (top-level mirror of Auto/Comeketo Agent/)
warnings: Identical to Auto/Comeketo Agent/ except .DS_Store. One is a duplicate.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Editing Auto/orchestrator/state/ files as canonical truth
common_wrong_turns.fix: Find generator in Auto/orchestrator/bin/. State is regenerated on every refresh.py run.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Treating Boxes UI page as client source of truth
common_wrong_turns.fix: Boxes page is a UI surface. Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/ is canonical.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Editing a seven-day plan without checking guardrails
common_wrong_turns.fix: Read Auto/comeketo-inbox/references/guardrails.md and the box's 01b_comms_verbatim.md first. Plans are subordinate to comms/state/guardrails/approvals.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Using enrichment facts as customer-facing facts
common_wrong_turns.fix: Customer-facing copy must ground in 01_comms.md / 01b_comms_verbatim.md, not 04_profile.md or *_enrichment.md.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Updating a UI page without updating the sitemap
common_wrong_turns.fix: page_asset_sitemap.md (project root) is the Done Gate. Update Assets Ownership, Change Checklist, History, Last Verified.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Fixing one client's edge case by changing global automation

common_wrong_turns.fix: Use root-level page_asset_sitemap.md. The docs/ copy is stale and abandoned.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Adding/editing scripts in Auto/Onboard Scripts/ assuming top-level matches
common_wrong_turns.fix: Top-level Onboard Scripts/ is the superset. Add to top-level. Coordinate Auto/ duplicate explicitly.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Editing Auto/Boxes/orchestrator/ thinking it's the live orchestrator
common_wrong_turns.fix: Live orchestrator is Auto/orchestrator/. Auto/Boxes/ is a stale snapshot. Don't edit; flag with Jake.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Editing Comeketo Agent/ (top-level) thinking it differs from Auto/Comeketo Agent/
common_wrong_turns.fix: They're identical except .DS_Store. Pick one as canonical when Jake decides.
CLAUDE.md is out of date. Reality is 26 dirs. Trust this ledger's §4.2.

common_wrong_turns.mistake: Writing through the Auto/ symlink without authorization
common_wrong_turns.fix: Auto/ targets /Users/jakeaaron/Desktop/Auto/. Read-only by default; writes need explicit team OK.

open_problems_to_log.summary: CLAUDE.md §1 surviving-domains list is out of date vs actual CCAgentindex/ contents (26 dirs, 10 stubs, 16 populated). Reconcile.
docs/page_asset_sitemap.md (11 KB) is abandoned; root version is canonical. Likely safe to delete docs/ copy.
Auto/Boxes/ mirrors orchestrator + comeketo-inbox with newer mtime. Origin and purpose unclear. Coordinate with Jake.
Top-level Onboard Scripts/ is a 31-file superset of Auto/Onboard Scripts/ (24 files). Resolve duplicate.
Comeketo Agent/ and Auto/Comeketo Agent/ are identical except .DS_Store. Resolve.
